# 🎯 Task 04.4: Validation & Testing

## 📅 Sprint Info
- **Duration:** 4 days | **M2** | **P1** | **Depends:** 04.3 ✅ | **Blocks:** 05.1

## 🎬 Build
Comprehensive testing of structured data pipeline. Validation across 20+ languages and schemas.

## 📋 Days
**D1-2:** Multi-language test corpus  
**D3:** End-to-end integration tests  
**D4:** Performance validation, docs

## ✅ Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Structured-data pipeline reaches ≥95% extraction accuracy on the validation suite.
- [ ] Validation suite covers 20+ languages/scripts.
- [ ] Persian/Iran commerce and local-service examples are included.
- [ ] Full test coverage includes malformed markup, duplicate schema blocks, missing fields, and stale structured data.

## 📊 Quality Evidence
- [ ] Attach validation report with per-language and per-schema breakdowns.
- [ ] Include failure examples and recommended follow-up tasks.
- [ ] Confirm M2 structured signals do not regress M1.5 retrieval quality.
- [ ] Publish the M2 handoff checklist for M3/M4/M6.

## 🎉 Celebrate: 🎊 M2 COMPLETE! Content Understanding Done!
